items.title: A US startup just cleared a major solid-state battery milestone – production is next
items.description: A US startup just cleared a major solid-state battery milestone – production is next  Electrek
summary_3_sentences: A US startup has achieved a significant milestone in solid-state battery technology.
This breakthrough paves the way for the next stage of development, which is production.
The company's success marks a notable advancement in the quest for next-generation batteries.

items.title: ION Storage Systems Announced Successful Customer Qualification of Cornerstone™ Cell Performance, Becoming the First U.S. Solid-State Battery Tech Company to Achieve This Milestone
items.description: ION Storage Systems Announced Successful Customer Qualification of Cornerstone™ Cell Performance, Becoming the First U.S. Solid-State Battery Tech Company to Achieve This Milestone  PR Newswire
summary_3_sentences: ION Storage Systems announced the successful customer qualification of its Cornerstone™ cell performance.
This achievement makes ION Storage Systems the first U.S. solid-state battery tech company to reach this milestone.
The qualification signifies a critical step towards commercialization and market adoption of their solid-state battery technology.

items.title: Donut Lab solid-state battery retains 97.7% charge after 10 days in third test
items.description: Donut Lab solid-state battery retains 97.7% charge after 10 days in third test  Electrek
summary_3_sentences: Donut Lab's solid-state battery demonstrated impressive charge retention in its third test, holding 97.7% after 10 days.
This result further validates the performance and reliability of their solid-state battery technology.
The sustained charge retention is a key indicator for practical applications in various electronic devices and electric vehicles.

items.title: Desk-calendar sized: CALB debuts 60Ah solid-state battery with 1,000 km range
items.description: Desk-calendar sized: CALB debuts 60Ah solid-state battery with 1,000 km range  CarNewsChina.com
summary_3_sentences: CALB has unveiled a new 60Ah solid-state battery with a claimed range of 1,000 km.
The battery is notably compact, described as desk-calendar sized, suggesting advancements in energy density and form factor.
This development could significantly impact the electric vehicle market by offering longer ranges in a smaller package.

items.title: Solid State Battery Market size to cross $27.7 Billion by 2035 |
items.description: Solid State Battery Market size to cross $27.7 Billion by 2035 |  openPR.com
summary_3_sentences: The global solid-state battery market is projected to exceed $27.7 billion by 2035.
This significant growth indicates a strong demand and rapid adoption of solid-state battery technology in the coming years.
The market expansion is driven by advancements in battery performance, safety, and the increasing needs of electric vehicles and consumer electronics.

items.title: Donut Lab says latest test proves its solid-state battery isn’t a supercapacitor
items.description: Donut Lab says latest test proves its solid-state battery isn’t a supercapacitor  The Verge
summary_3_sentences: Donut Lab has released data from its latest test, asserting that its solid-state battery is not a supercapacitor.
This clarification addresses potential market confusion and highlights the battery's distinct energy storage capabilities.
The company aims to position its technology as a true solid-state battery solution for demanding applications.

items.title: Donut Lab publishes data on charge retention
items.description: Donut Lab publishes data on charge retention  electrive.com
summary_3_sentences: Donut Lab has published data detailing the charge retention capabilities of its solid-state battery.
The published data provides evidence of the battery's performance over time.
This transparency aims to build confidence in the technology's reliability for future applications.

items.title: LG에너지솔루션 vs 삼성SDI…인터배터리서 '배터리 특허전' 공개 충돌
items.description: 또 다른 질문에서는 전고체 배터리가 안전성을 강조하는 기술이라면 전기차나 도심항공교통(UAM)에서 굳이 각형 케이스가 필요한지에 대한 문제 제기도 나왔다. 이에 삼성SDI 측은 전기차 배터리는 높은 안전 기준을...
summary_3_sentences: LG Energy Solution and Samsung SDI engaged in a public debate regarding battery patents at InterBattery.
A question was raised about the necessity of prismatic cases for solid-state batteries, given their enhanced safety.
Samsung SDI responded by emphasizing their tailored strategies for different market segments.

items.title: K배터리, 팽팽한 특허 '신경전'…"특허 침해 좌시하지 않을 것"
items.description: LG에너지솔루션 소속이라고 밝힌 한 청중은 주 부사장에게 삼성SDI의 가장 원천적이고 강력한 특허를 딱 하나만 소개해달라고 요청했고, 또 다른 LG에너지솔루션 직원도 "전고체 배터리가 안전하다면 전기차나...
summary_3_sentences: A representative from LG Energy Solution inquired about Samsung SDI's most fundamental and powerful patent.
Another LG Energy Solution employee questioned the need for prismatic cases if solid-state batteries are inherently safe.
This exchange highlights the intense patent competition and differing technological perspectives between the two companies.

items.title: "각형 특허만 1200건"…삼성SDI "기술 도용 좌시 않겠다"
items.description: LG에너지솔루션 관계자가 "전고체 배터리가 충분히 안전하다면 굳이 무거운 각형 폼팩터를 고집할 필요가 있느냐"며 제품 포트폴리오의 중복 가능성을 지적하자, 주 소장은 시장별 맞춤형 전략으로 응수했다. 그는...
summary_3_sentences: Samsung SDI stated they hold 1,200 patents related to prismatic battery cases and will not tolerate technology infringement.
An LG Energy Solution representative questioned the necessity of prismatic form factors for solid-state batteries, given their safety.
Samsung SDI's head responded by highlighting their customized strategies for various market needs.

items.title: LG엔솔 "카피 멈추고 수업료 내라" vs 삼성SDI "국내 타사 특허 고작 30건...
items.description: 또 다른 LG에너지솔루션 직원은 "전고체 배터리가 그렇게 안전하다면 굳이 전기차나 도심항공교통(UAM)에 무거운 각형 케이스를 써야 할 이유가 있냐"며 삼성SDI의 폼팩터 포트폴리오 중복 문제를 날카롭게 꼬집었다....
summary_3_sentences: An LG Energy Solution employee questioned the need for heavy prismatic cases in electric vehicles and UAMs if solid-state batteries are sufficiently safe.
This point was raised during a discussion at InterBattery, targeting potential overlap in Samsung SDI's product portfolio.
The exchange underscores the competitive landscape and differing technological approaches in the battery industry.

items.title: [인터배터리 2026] 개막 D-1···관전 포인트는 '전고체 배터리'
items.description: 대표적으로 2차전지 장비업체 하나기술은 '전고체 배터리 전 공정 턴키(Turnkey) 대응 기술'을 중점적으로 소개한다. 기존 리튬이온 배터리의 원형, 각형, 파우치형 등 모든 폼팩터에 대한 통합 공급 능력을 바탕으로 전고체...
summary_3_sentences: InterBattery 2026 is set to highlight solid-state batteries as a key area of focus.
Hana Technology will be showcasing its turnkey solutions for the entire solid-state battery manufacturing process.
The company emphasizes its capability to supply integrated solutions for all existing lithium-ion battery form factors, including cylindrical, prismatic, and pouch types.

items.title: 유럽·북미가 먼저 찾는다… 성일하이텍, 글로벌 '폐배터리 허브' 도약
items.description: 글로벌 배터리 소재 공급망의 핵심 축으로 부상할 것"이라고 말했다. 반도체 및 디스플레이 장비에서 2차전지 소재로 영역을 넓힌 미래산업과 탄산리튬을 가공하는 미래나노텍 역시 현재 각각 5.54%, 4.48% 상승하며 견조한...
summary_3_sentences: Sungil Hi-Tech is emerging as a global hub for battery recycling, attracting interest from Europe and North America.
The company aims to become a crucial part of the global battery material supply chain.
Mirae Industry and Mirae NanoTech, involved in semiconductor, display equipment, and lithium carbonate processing respectively, are also showing strong performance.

items.title: "차세대 ESS·EV 시장을 겨냥한 배터리 핵심 소재 기술을 선보인다"… 동...
items.description: 동원시스템즈이 11~13일 서울 코엑스에서 열린 '인터배터리 2026'에서 2차전지 핵심 소재인 '코팅 양극박(PCAF)'을 국내 최초로 공개했다. 동원시스템즈에 따르면, 코팅 양극박은 알루미늄박에 카본 기반 프라이머를...
summary_3_sentences: Dongwon Systems introduced its 'Coated Anode Foil (PCAF)' at InterBattery 2026, a key material for next-generation ESS and EV markets.
This marks the first domestic unveiling of this advanced battery material in Korea.
The coated anode foil utilizes a carbon-based primer applied to aluminum foil, enhancing battery performance.

items.title: [인터배터리 2026 개막] 2차전지 기술부터 공급망까지 생태계 아우른다
items.description: 산업통상부가 올해 14번째를 맞이하는 국내 최대이자 대표적인 국제 배터리 전시회 '2026 인터배터리'를 11일부터 3일간 코엑스에서 개최한다. 사진/인터배터리 2026 홈페이지 산업통상부가 올해 14번째를 맞이하는 국내...
summary_3_sentences: The 2026 InterBattery exhibition, the largest of its kind in Korea, commenced today at COEX.
This 14th iteration of the event covers the entire battery ecosystem, from technology to supply chains.
The exhibition will run for three days, showcasing the latest advancements in the battery industry.

items.title: "적자 2조 늪"…K-배터리, 성장 대신 '수성' 선회하나
items.description: LG에너지솔루션 미시간 홀랜드 공장에서 직원이 배터리 생산 공정을 점검하고 있다./ LG에너지솔루션 | 서울=한스경제 김창수 기자 | 국내 주요 2차전지 기업들이 지난해 2조원에 달하는 영업손실을 기록, 수익성에...
summary_3_sentences: Major South Korean battery companies recorded a combined operating loss of approximately 2 trillion won last year.
This financial performance suggests a potential shift from growth-focused strategies to a focus on profitability and stability.
The industry is facing challenges that necessitate a re-evaluation of business approaches.

items.title: LG에너지솔루션 김제영 CTO, 'AI 에이전트 활용 R&D 혁신' 제시
items.description: 이 밖에도 김 CTO는 ▲프리미엄 전기차용 고에너지밀도 배터리, 가격 경쟁력을 갖춘 중저가 솔루션, ESS 전용 LFP 기반 제품 등 시장 세그먼트별 맞춤 전략 ▲소듐 이온 배터리, 전고체 배터리와 같은 차세대...
summary_3_sentences: LG Energy Solution's CTO, Kim Gye-young, proposed innovations in R&D utilizing AI agents.
He also outlined market-specific strategies including high-energy density batteries for premium EVs, cost-effective solutions for mid-to-low-end markets, and LFP-based products for ESS.
Furthermore, he mentioned advancements in next-generation batteries such as sodium-ion and solid-state batteries.
